label: M4_DCM-AdminTools
info:
Backend flows for Access Control & Admin Tools.

MongoDB collections:
  - dcm_users
  - dcm_roles
  - dcm_audit_log
  - auth_users
  - auth_sessions

Operations:
  - listUsers, getUserDetail, createUser, updateUser, deleteUser
  - listRoles, createRole, updateRole, deleteRole
  - listAudit
  - getAdminTools (legacy compat)

All operations go through the permission gate.

SRS Requirements covered:
  FR-AC-01: User Roles - CRUD for all areas

name: ══ Admin Tools & Access Control Backend (FR-AC-01) ══
info:
Full user lifecycle, role management, and audit logging.
All operations are permission-gated via session token + dcm_users + dcm_roles.

name: permission gate: prepare session lookup
permission gate: lookup caller
permission gate: find caller roles
permission gate: check permission
denied: audit + respond
restore denied response
listUsers: query dcm_users
listUsers: response
getUserDetail: query
getUserDetail: get audit
getUserDetail: response
createUser: validate input
createUser: check username + email uniqueness
createUser: hash password + insert auth_users
createUser: insert dcm_users
createUser: final response
func:
msg.payload = msg._createUserResponse;
return msg;

name: updateUser: apply update
updateUser: build $set + no-op check
updateUser: fetch updated user
deleteUser: soft delete
deleteUser: check admin/self + hard delete
deleteUser: remove from auth_users + invalidate sessions
deleteUser: invalidate sessions
deleteUser: audit + respond
deleteUser: final
func:
msg.payload = msg._deleteResponse;
return msg;

name: listRoles: query dcm_roles
listRoles: response
createRole: insert
createRole: respond
func:
msg.payload = msg._createRoleResponse;
return msg;

name: updateRole: check system + update
updateRole: apply
updateRole: respond
func:
msg.payload = msg._updateRoleResponse;
return msg;

name: deleteRole: check system
deleteRole: delete if not system
deleteRole: respond
func:
msg.payload = msg._deleteRoleResponse;
return msg;

name: listAudit: query
listAudit: response
createUser: check email conflict + find role
createUser: ensure custom role
createUser: audit + respond
expireSweep: update expired + invalidate sessions
expireSweep: invalidate sessions
expireSweep: done
getMonitoringOverview: prepare
getMonitoringOverview: process
write heartbeat
